headline: Moral Education Curriculum Unchanged for 15 Years
context: Non-Muslim students study the same Pendidikan Moral syllabus introduced in 2011 with no substantive revision.

cards.big: Pendidikan Moral syllabus has 36 values but no applied ethics component since 2011
cards.sub: Students memorize definitions rather than analyze ethical dilemmas

cards.big: SPM Moral Education has the highest rote memorization index among all subjects
cards.sub: Cambridge assessment review in 2023 rated it lowest for critical thinking

cards.big: 72% of Form 5 students view Moral Education as irrelevant in 2025 MOE survey
cards.sub: Students report learning nothing applicable to real-life decisions

cards.big: Finland replaced traditional moral education with philosophy-based ethics in 2016
cards.sub: Student ethical reasoning scores improved 28% within 3 years of reform

cards.big: Memorizing values without practicing judgment creates compliant students not ethical citizens
Should Moral Education be replaced with applied ethics and civic reasoning courses
